{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321142413DE78B49E1CD8A5F5754A"}"},"total":2200},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7601166096420012824","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"太好看了，简直让男人看了来月经，女人看了发神经，是抑郁症的克星，是植物人的闹钟。是美出村里五保户对寡妇的思念和爱而不得，帅到眼泪从嘴角流出淹成钱塘江大潮，是神是我的玫瑰照亮黑暗生命，我飞跑猛跳在20楼阳台跳探戈，意识到神确实存在，被美到泪流不止从此世界不再缺水。","text_exts":[{"e":36,"s":33,"text":"植物人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%A4%8D%E7%89%A9%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774074254A5F5754A%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227601166096420012824%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227575451486188997657%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%A4%8D%E7%89%A9%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769787139,"group_id":"7575451486188997657","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"巴巴托斯天下第一","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/FEExjT3hhzbEaT/1RrZsA=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/471c85ef61684f83bc6f70b329e3d4d7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616201&x-signature=rmPoS3ZW6jcXx4owJaei5quhnZk%3D","user_id":"93061199691","user_name":"暗恋小吉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"93061199691","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7575451486188997657","book_info":{"abstract":"【温馨+养崽+美食+细水长流+小甜文】
墨（黑豹攻）✘白泽（猞猁受）双洁1V1
白泽穿越了，还是高级的魂穿，一觉醒来，身处原始森林的山洞里不说，还多了个伴侣和幼崽。
可惜原身对伴侣不好，对幼崽更是行为恶劣。穿越过来的白泽，望着眼前这一大一小两只黑豹，心都软了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0700df446269d0be9f4d9df497b18700","author":"圆润的大土豆","author_id":"","book_id":"7575451486188997657","book_name":"哪有黑豹爱上猞猁的呀！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0a0a8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"20.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":72,"name":"兽世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=72&name=兽世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":758,"name":"古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=758&name=古代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":847,"name":"养崽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=847&name=养崽&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7575451605756019225","read_count":"206081","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"356185"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"164","tags":"双男主,穿越,兽世,古代,养崽,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/2e8ddf246dbf9e466759b8acab9a82c6~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779258254&x-signature=jkITsJM2R5c4AezuOyL6NIWe6VA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1143101824964487","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"68"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321142413DE78B49E1CD8A5F5754A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1755,
